utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Excuse me . Hi , I am a professor here . Do you know the Paleontology section , fifth floor , stack 437 ?

utterances.speaker: The Librarian
utterances.text: Well , yes ! Just give me five minutes , I just have to find someone to cover my shift .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No ! No ! ! No ! Can I speak to someone in charge please ? !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hi , I was wondering if it is possible to increase security in the Paleontology section ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: See I ... I wrote a book up there and instead of reading it people are ... are ... are well , rolling around in front of it .

emotion_cause.span: 6_instead of reading it people are ... are ... are well , rolling around in front of it .
